contentBlocks.original:
सरस्वति महाभागे विद्ये कमललोचने ।
विद्यारूपे विशालाक्षि विद्यां देहि नमोस्तुते ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarasvati mahābhāge vidye kamalalocane .
vidyārūpe viśālākṣi vidyāṃ dehi namostute ..
contentBlocks.translation: O Devi Saraswati, the most auspicious goddess of knowledge with lotus-like eyes, an embodiment of knowledge with large eyes, kindly bless me with knowledge. I salute you.
contentBlocks.meanings: सरस्वति (sarasvati) – O Saraswati; महाभागे (mahābhāge) – most auspicious (mahā:great | bhāge:fortunate); विद्ये (vidye) – O knowledge; कमललोचने (kamalalocane) – with lotus-like eyes (kamala:lotus | locane:eyes); विद्यारूपे (vidyārūpe) – embodiment of knowledge (vidyā:knowledge | rūpe:form); विशालाक्षि (viśālākṣi) – with large eyes (viśāla:large | akṣi:eyes); विद्यां (vidyāṃ) – knowledge; देहि (dehi) – give; नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; अस्तुते (astute) – to you;
